who: HR teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
offer: For HR teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, inaccurate payroll data causes compliance issues. We provide a payroll data reconciliation tool instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate payroll data reconciliation leading to compliance issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR teams seeking solutions
Engage on Indie Hackers about payroll data challenges
DM 20-50 HR teams with demo video links
Share insights in community forums for HR tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry for timesheets and comparison of benefits and tax withholdings on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the tool
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing payroll data
Streamline onboarding process for new users
